interactive_setup: Sign in at https://app.composio.dev and copy a personal API key (Hobby tier is free up to 20K calls/month).
Add COMPOSIO_API_KEY in operator-controlled API Keys (service-keys.json).
Scope the key with allowedAgents to enforce per-agent isolation per the Q2 decision in HANDOFF_OPEN_DESIGN_COMPOSIO_INTEGRATION_REPLY.md.
Slice 2.1 ships SDK install + connectivity gating only — no tool execution. Flip connectors.composio.enabled=true per agent to run the connectivity probe (default-off, Q4).

commands.summary: Report connector setup and readiness status (slice 2.1)
